signHandoff.returnHint: Return to Safari — this page won't refresh
signHandoff.oneTapHint: Signing in Safari will now open Vela directly. Tap ‹ Safari (top-left) to go back.

safariExt.heroBody: On iPhone Safari, almost any dApp can connect to Vela directly. Connecting and reading happen right in Safari — only signing hops to Vela for a Face ID confirmation. No wallet-app switching, no seed phrase.
safariExt.step1: Open a dApp website in Safari.
safariExt.step2: Tap “Aa” in the address bar → Manage Extensions, and turn on Vela Wallet.
safariExt.step3: Tap “Aa” → Vela Wallet → Allow (allowing once on a site is enough).
safariExt.step4: On the site’s Connect Wallet list, choose Vela Wallet.
safariExt.oneTapBody: When you sign, Vela opens for a quick Face ID confirmation, then returns to the page. Enable one-tap (via “Test one-tap signing” in the extension popup) and even the “Open in Vela?” prompt disappears.
safariExt.ctaHint: Opens Safari, where the “Aa” menu and the Vela toggle live.
safariExt.settingsSubtitle: Connect to any dApp in the browser
